endpoints.returns: Aggregate of the AI datacenter buildout: disclosed power (MW) and capex totals by operator, region, and status, plus the forward commissioning calendar of sites coming online.
Silicon-vendor concentration shares, circular-loop classification, top recipients, and co-investor pairs.
Signed leadership and concentration ruling over the federal AI-spending snapshot, with the cohort leader and top-2 share.
Signed federal AI procurement demand read: agency concentration (top-agency share and HHI), emerging contractors winning AI work beyond the known vendor cohort, and the top buying agencies.
Full ranked pipeline of open federal AI contract opportunities (SAM.gov) sorted by response deadline, each with days remaining, set-aside type, buying agency, and the direct solicitation link.
Full benchmark-score time series across a date range (free sibling caps at 7 days).
Full untruncated cross-source story clusters, single-date or 30-day range.
Full untruncated daily news snapshots, single-date or range up to 30 days.
Per-source RSS reliability series up to 90 days.
The verified feed: story clusters with N or more independent corroborating sources (default 4).
Full model-pricing time series across a date range (free sibling caps at 7 days).
Full provider-uptime time series across a date range (free sibling caps at 7 days).
Full per-model TFII breakdown over the latest daily snapshot: headline score, per-task subscores, and the trust block; ?model= narrows to one model.
A single model TFII time series across the dated snapshots within the requested window.
Full forward-only changelog of model lifecycle events (added, removed, repriced, deprecated), agent-protocol spec versions, and agent-framework releases across a date range, filterable by event type.
Daily MCP-registry drift time series across a date range.
Full per-domain agent-readiness dataset: a transparent 0-100 score, tier, and which agent surfaces (x402, agent.json, openapi, llms.txt, crawlable, ai.txt) each domain exposes.
Full filterable agent-ecosystem directory cohort.
Untruncated reputation leaderboard with full cards for every ranked agent (free sibling caps at 25).
Per-ticker AI intelligence envelope: latest filings, news, funding, and cohort metadata in one round trip.
Historical flip log of robots.txt access changes (allowed to blocked, or new llms.txt) across a date range.
Every tracked domain with per-bot robots.txt verdicts, llms.txt and ai.txt flags, plus sector rollups.
AI-token price moves joined with venue-weighted funding-rate skew, with per-token setup classification.
AI-stack CVE intelligence (filter + categorize) over the Qwen security-xsource extraction, 99.8% GHSA-sourced.
Batch lookup of up to 10 AI-stack CVE records by comma-separated ids.
Single AI-stack CVE record lookup from the extraction pipeline.
The live-threat subset of AI-stack CVEs known exploited in the wild.
Per-developer and per-deployer incident exposure rollups over the AVID snapshot with recency-weighted scores.
Per-package risk_score (0-100) over the OSV snapshot with risk_band, notable movers, and rollups.
AI-velocity ranking plus cross-pollination over the federated HF and GitHub trending snapshot.
AI-relevant entries from the APIs.guru directory with first_seen diffing and a newly-added-last-7d array.
Daily attention-index time series for a provider across a date range.
Score and rank deltas vs a prior coding-harness snapshot, gainers/regressions, entered/exited, leader churn.
Side-by-side comparison of multiple models by id across pricing, capability, and status.
Projected spend per model over a horizon given daily token volumes.

Full designation-change history over the EU NANDO / SMCS register for the AI Act, Cyber Resilience Act, and EUCC: every first designation, status change, scope change, and delisting, timestamped on the day TensorFeed observed it. The Commission publishes no time series.

Full filterable history of US BIS AI and advanced-computing export-control actions (Entity List changes, advanced-computing license and threshold rules, due-diligence measures) by date range and category, classified from the Federal Register.
Daily Hugging Face download-velocity over a 90-day window with entered/exited churn and window gainers.
Cross-provider arbitrage analytics over the inference-providers matrix: spreads, value scores, top opportunities.
Full and filtered agent-work listing cohort; removed listings are never served.
Window-centered model-deprecation timeline with urgency_band, days_until_sunset, and a resolved migration_chain.
Full Haiku-derived agent action-card cohort with capability/urgency/impact filters and rollups.
Structured verification scores for one corroboration cluster: tier, source diversity, time span, per-source breakdown.
Search recent days for clusters whose hero title matches a query, ranked by match score then source count.
Full-text search over the historical news corpus with date, provider, and category filters.
Daily OpenRouter cross-provider catalog drift over a 90-day window with price-change and churn counts.
Forward and backward calendar over the AI policy registry with next-3-milestones and days-until-effective.
One paid provider deep-dive envelope composing pricing, status, and capability for a single provider.
Sub-hourly recent-changes feed, the higher-cadence sibling of the whats-new brief.
Register a webhook watch (POST); HMAC-signed callback fires when the spec condition triggers. 1 credit per registration.
Morning brief over the last 24h of news, models, status, and ecosystem deltas.
Pro morning brief: base payload plus a Haiku analyst summary, cited key takeaways, and recommended actions.
Momentum and velocity ratio per AI/ML PyPI package with direction classification and notable movers.
Per-package release velocity, latest bump_kind, breaking-change radar, and notable movers.

Full ranked list of AI-related US Federal Register actions (rules, proposed rules, notices, presidential documents) plus AI-named federal bills (GovInfo), with agency and document-type rollups. The executive and legislative policy layers in one signed read.

Period-over-period movers on the Open LLM Leaderboard v2: rank climbers and fallers, average and per-benchmark score deltas, models entered and exited, new per-benchmark leaders, and license changes, diffed across TensorFeed dated snapshots.
Top 100 AI authors by 365-day publication volume, enriched with h_index, citations, affiliation, ORCID.
Top 100 recent AI papers ranked by share of total citations gained in the most recent year.
Top-50 multi-word arXiv keyphrases ranked by recent-vs-baseline lift, with example arxiv_ids.
Top labs by paper count over 30d/90d/365d windows from TF normalized affiliations.
Last 30 days of arXiv preprints flagged as milestone candidates by offline Qwen extraction, with structured reasoning.
Structured arXiv search over the TF derived taxonomy (subfield + methodology dimensions arXiv lacks).
Per-institution AI research velocity over the OpenAlex 365-day baseline plus a fresh 30-day window.
Single-filing AI-disclosure extraction for one accession.
Full AI-bellwether cohort of Qwen-extracted AI-flagged SEC filings with optional filters.
Form-type rollup of AI-flagged SEC filings across the bellwether cohort.
Did this 10-K/10-Q materially change guidance vs the prior same-form filing, with the exact changed sentences quoted.
LLM-ready CVE record: ~80% token reduction vs raw MITRE v5.2, derived severity_band, flat affected_products.
LLM-ready EPSS score with derived risk_band; optional series=true returns first/min/max summary.
LLM-ready KEV entry with normalized ransomware_use enum and extracted notes_urls.
Per-vendor exploited-in-the-wild history: disclosure-to-KEV lag, patch status, ransomware association, severity mix.
Full corroborated GHSA advisory set for one package, enriched by verbatim-verified CVE id with explicit provenance.
CVE IDs added across a UTC date range, max 30 days.
Full historical EPSS exploitation-likelihood time series for one CVE.
Top-N highest-EPSS CVEs as of any UTC date.
All GHSA advisory types across all ecosystems filtered to AI keywords, with derived severity, age, and relevance.
Full untruncated CISA KEV catalog (~1500+ entries).
Daily KEV catalog additions across a date range, max 90 days.

GO/REVIEW/BLOCK pre-install safety verdict for one AI/ML package, fusing the known-malicious IOC list, the OSV advisory snapshot, the GHSA AI firehose, and release cadence. No-charge out_of_coverage when the package is in no TF security feed.

The CISA SSVC Coordinator decision (Act, Attend, Track, or Track*) for one CVE, computed from the recorded decision points and returned as the full low/medium/high Mission and Well-being envelope with a per-level reasoning trace, plus a KEV cross-check that flags and recomputes the decision when the recorded Exploitation understates a CVE now on the CISA KEV catalog.
Cross-database CVE fact card composing MITRE, KEV, EPSS, OSV, and Vulnrichment with a confirmed_by array.
Measured latency-probe time series for a provider across a date range.
Full incident cohort with provider/impact/action/capability filters and rollups, Haiku-triaged.
Full date-range cross-provider uptime ranking including incident_count and mttr_minutes per provider.
Per-provider Haiku-triaged incident stream pre-scoped by the path segment (openai/anthropic/google/aws/azure).

Signed ranking of the current AI buildout against curated historical capital cycles on peak capex as a percent of GDP, naming the closest and farthest analog and the dimensions that cannot yet be scored.
Trust band plus 0-100 score per benchmark, flagging saturation and contamination with a down-weight recommendation.
Best operational failover target when a provider degrades, with incident reason and ranked alternatives.

Cheapest inference host to serve one open-weight model at a monthly token volume, per-host projected spend, throughput context, and savings vs the caller current_provider. No-charge when the model is not in the matrix.

MIGRATE_NOW/MIGRATE_SOON/NO_ACTION ruling for one depended-on model: the recommended successor with blended-cost delta, capability (TFII) delta, days until sunset, and a drop-in note. Optional deadline=YYYY-MM-DD reconciles against the sunset. No-charge when the model is in no TF source.

Pareto-optimal set of models on a capability (TFII subscore) versus blended-price plane, with every dominated model flagged plus the model that dominates it. Optional task=code|reasoning|creative|general (default general).
Dependability ranking of probed frontier providers fusing availability and tail consistency.

RESILIENT/EXPOSED/CRITICAL ruling on a caller-supplied AI-provider dependency set: single-point-of-failure exposure, which providers are impaired right now, the weakest link, and the most dependable provider to add. No-charge when no listed provider is tracked.
Single best model to use now plus runners-up, fusing pricing, capability, usage, latency, and live incident state.
Top-N ranked models with full score breakdown, pricing, status, and component detail.

STABLE/WATCH/ACTION_NEEDED ruling on what moved under a declared stack in the last N days (deprecated/sunsetting model, breaking package major bump, agent-protocol spec bump), classified by break-risk. At least one of models, packages, or protocols is required. No-charge when nothing in the stack is tracked.
GO/HOLD/BLOCK deploy gate per AI-stack package, fusing the AI-CVE batch and CISA KEV.
Ruling on the Base x402 USDC settlement market: momentum, concentration (HHI), and leading publisher.
Per-publisher x402 USDC settlement receipt feed for one domain across an inclusive date range, with rollups.
Time series of ecosystem or per-publisher x402 settlement volume / count across a date range.
Signed trust verdict on a single x402 publisher: whether its Base payTo is actively settling, its 30-day settlement momentum, and a shared-wallet risk flag, with the settlement evidence.
Daily x402 publisher-registry drift over a 90-day window: reachability, federation count, endpoint totals, churn.

note: All premium endpoints settle in USDC on Base via x402 and return an Ed25519-signed AFTA receipt; free callers get a 50-credit welcome bonus on first payment.
attribution: TensorFeed.ai premium catalog. 1 credit = $0.02. See /developers/agent-payments for the payment flow.
